title: Russian Pan-Seared Steak with Dumplings
description: A hearty and flavorful dish featuring a perfectly pan-seared Russian-style steak served with homemade dumplings.
instructions: Season the steak with salt and black pepper.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Add butter and sear the steak for 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the steak from the skillet and set aside to rest.
In a separate bowl, mix together flour, egg, and milk to form a dough.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces. Roll each piece into a ball and flatten slightly into a disk.
Dust the dumplings with flour and add to the skillet used for the steak.
Pour beef broth into the skillet and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-12 minutes, or until dumplings are cooked through.
Slice the rested steak against the grain. Serve with dumplings and pan juices.
